name: Bandera Mexicana
recipeInstructions:
1. Fill six cocktail glasses with crushed ice.
2. Scoop one melon ball from the jicama using a melon baller.
3. Place one jicama ball, one grape (or lime wedge), and one cherry on each pick.
4. In a pitcher, combine sugar, lime juice, and tequila.
5. Stir the mixture until well combined.
6. Pour the liquid into the cocktail glasses.
7. Top each glass with "Mexican flag" garnish.
